name: The Fire
original_name: โซ่รักอัคนี
overview:
Bound by the Watinwanit clan, four romances converge where desire meets danger. Each current tests loyalty, power, and the price of safety.

In the South, Atjima reunites with rival Kaprao Arthitya, a spark that could kindle love or reopen old wounds.

trailers.title: OFFICIAL OVERTURE - โซ่รักอัคนี | The Fire 4 Elements บ้านวาทินวณิช
